title: Local and CI test runner compatibility
goal: Make the Leitstand test/run instructions account for the observed local Node 22/V8 crash and Vitest WebAssembly limitation without weakening CI evidence.

acceptance.assertion: The task records whether the Node 22 crash is local-host specific, package-version related, or expected under the current environment.
Recommended local test commands are executable on the Heim-PC or document a known fallback that does not pretend full Vitest success.
GitHub CI remains the source of truth for full test pass/fail; no test is skipped merely to hide the local runner issue.

metadata.priority_reason: P2/P3: local validation is currently partially blocked; CI was green on main
